principle: abstractions should be earned, not guessed

entries.name: Methodology Guard Pilot
entries.problem: Issues and PRs drift without hierarchy, business value, review mode, evidence, or scope/boundary information.
entries.owner_scope: .github mechanism during pilot; Demerzel owns policy semantics if promoted
forbidden_dependencies: Demerzel policy internals inside checker script
entries.success_signal: Two repo pilots produce useful artifact reports with tolerable false positives.
entries.risk_if_wrong: Creates process friction and turns .github into policy authority.
entries.promotion_gate: At least two consumer repos, reviewed false positives, version tag, rollback path, Demerzel policy boundary clarified.
entries.retirement_gate: Too noisy, no useful findings, or replaced by Demerzel-owned policy pack.

entries.name: Versioned Import Policy
entries.problem: Shared workflows consumed through @main create hidden coupling and hard-to-debug behavior changes.
entries.owner_scope: .github documents import mechanics; Demerzel should govern high-impact bump policy if it becomes policy.
entries.contract_exposed: explicit workflow_ref, policy_ref, mode, and rollback path
entries.success_signal: Consumer repos can explain exactly which shared workflow version they run and why.
entries.risk_if_wrong: Creates bureaucracy around simple pilot workflows.
entries.promotion_gate: A stable shared workflow has at least two consumers and a version tag.
entries.retirement_gate: No shared workflows reach stable status or policy proves unnecessary.

entries.name: Shared Agent Configuration Deduplication
entries.problem: Agent skills, compact thresholds, auth, and cost-safe conventions may be copied across repos.
entries.owner_scope: .github mechanism, with Demerzel/TARS/IX boundaries for policy/reasoning/metrics
forbidden_dependencies: unreviewed prompt/model coupling across all repos
entries.contract_exposed: TBD after inspecting two concrete consumer configs
entries.success_signal: Two repos share the same setup with less copy-paste and clear local overrides.
entries.promotion_gate: Two concrete duplicated configs are reviewed and a minimal contract is obvious.
entries.retirement_gate: Configs diverge for valid repo-specific reasons.
